name: @eqlcc/desktop-ipc
description: Transport-agnostic typed IPC seam (E2.2a, docs/DESKTOP_IPC_SPEC.md) between the desktop UI and the Node session-service sidecar: a small JSON request/response protocol plus a SessionIpcHost (sidecar side) and SessionIpcClient (UI side), decoupled from the concrete wire behind an injectable IpcTransport. Pure TS; carries only session-service view-model types across the wire.
